title: Mean Girls

characters.name: Cady Heron
characters.archetype: The new girl from Africa. Joins the Plastics as a project. Becomes one. Lindsay Lohan.

characters.name: Regina George
characters.archetype: Queen of the Plastics. Apex predator. 'I love your skirt — where did you get it?'

characters.name: Karen Smith
characters.archetype: The dim Plastic. 'I have ESPN or something.' Used as a weapon by Regina.

characters.name: Gretchen Wieners
characters.archetype: Father invented Toaster Strudel. Fetch. Loyal but increasingly paranoid.

characters.name: Janis
characters.archetype: Cady's first friend. Architect of the Regina takedown. Originally Janis Ian, now Janis 'Imi'ike.

characters.name: Damian
characters.archetype: 'He's almost too gay to function.' Janis's bestie. Comedy gold.

characters.name: Aaron Samuels
characters.archetype: Regina's ex. Cady's crush. Hair like cool insulation.

characters.name: Ms. Norbury
characters.archetype: The Tina Fey character. Calc teacher. The voice of reason.

characters.name: Mr. Duvall
characters.archetype: The principal who sweats. Tim Meadows / Busy Philipps in 2024.

characters.name: Mrs. George
characters.archetype: Regina's 'cool mom'. The 'I'm not a regular mom, I'm a cool mom' line.

characters.name: Kevin Gnapoor
characters.archetype: Mathlete. Performs the rap at the talent show.

characters.name: Glen Coco
characters.archetype: Never seen on screen. The patron saint of getting four candy canes. 'You go Glen Coco.'

signature_quotes: Get in loser, we're going shopping.
I want my pink shirt back.
Stop trying to make fetch happen!
She's a life-ruiner. She ruins people's lives.
I can't help it that I'm popular.
Four for you, Glen Coco. You go, Glen Coco.
viral_moments: The Burn Book reveal in the gym.
Aaron Samuels turning around in slow motion.
Regina getting hit by the bus.
Mrs. George 'I'm a cool mom' moment.
The 'fetch' insistence and Regina's takedown of it.
memes: 'On Wednesdays we wear pink' — every Wednesday on the internet.
'She doesn't even go here' — used in every group chat for any outsider.
'Stop trying to make fetch happen' — applied to every doomed branding attempt.
'It's October 3rd' — every Oct 3 the internet does a Mean Girls Day.
'Boo, you whore' — used (PG version) for every minor friend betrayal.
The 'Limit does not exist' for any pop math/limit moment.
'You go Glen Coco' — universal 'good for you' shoutout.
off_screen_drama: Lindsay Lohan's career trajectory after Mean Girls became its own news cycle for two decades.
The 2024 musical film reception was mixed — Reneé Rapp got the most love.
Tim Meadows came back in 2024 — only original cast member.
Rachel McAdams politely declined the 2024 cameo.
The musical's 2018 Broadway run won 12 Tony nominations.
Amanda Seyfried's career took off post-Mamma Mia, post-Mean Girls.
Tina Fey's role as Ms. Norbury becoming meta over time.
running_jokes: October 3rd is a national holiday in the gay community.
Karen knowing things she shouldn't know ('I have ESPN').
Gretchen's father inventing Toaster Strudel coming up randomly.
Damian being the funniest person in any scene he's in.
Glen Coco never appearing but being beloved by all.
The Plastics' rules getting more absurd every screening.
Aaron Samuels' hair being its own character.
